_description: Basic golden file: 2 DS channels (table), 1 US channel (table), 2 system_info fields (html_fields)
_parser_yaml:
downstream:
  format: table
  resource: /status.html
  tables:
    - selector:
        type: header_text
        match: Downstream
      row_start: 2
      columns:
        - index: 0
          field: channel_id
          type: integer
        - index: 1
          field: frequency
          type: frequency
          unit: Hz
        - index: 2
          field: power
          type: float
          unit: dBmV
      channel_type:
        fixed: qam
upstream:
  format: table
  resource: /status.html
  tables:
    - selector:
        type: header_text
        match: Upstream
      row_start: 2
      columns:
        - index: 0
          field: channel_id
          type: integer
        - index: 1
          field: frequency
          type: frequency
          unit: Hz
        - index: 2
          field: power
          type: float
          unit: dBmV
      channel_type:
        fixed: atdma
system_info:
  sources:
    - format: html_fields
      resource: /info.html
      fields:
        - label: Software Version
          field: software_version
          type: string
        - label: System Up Time
          field: system_uptime
          type: string

content.text:
Downstream
IDFrequencyPower
1507000000 Hz3.2 dBmV
2513000000 Hz2.8 dBmV
Upstream
IDFrequencyPower
136800000 Hz44.0 dBmV
